scripts.build: npm --prefix backend ci --include=dev --include=optional && npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev --include=optional && npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix backend run test:unit && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm --prefix backend run test:unit:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:unit:coverage && npm run test:integration:coverage
scripts.migrate:deploy: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
